mapper.sql: id, name, source_id, source_series_url, total_episodes, description, sort_order, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO video_group (name, source_id, source_series_url, total_episodes, description, sort_order) VALUES (#{name}, #{sourceId}, #{sourceSeriesUrl}, #{totalEpisodes}, #{description}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT g.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM video_collection v WHERE v.group_id = g.id) AS video_count FROM video_group g ORDER BY g.sort_order ASC, g.id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE video_group SET name = #{name}, source_id = #{sourceId}, source_series_url = #{sourceSeriesUrl}, total_episodes = #{totalEpisodes}, description = #{description}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM video_collection WHERE group_id = #{groupId}
